script.code: if (familyName != null && basic.stringify(familyName).trim() != '') return basic.stringify(familyName).trim(); if (fullName != null && basic.stringify(fullName).trim() != '') return basic.stringify(fullName).trim(); return null
def v = (input ?: '').toString().trim().toLowerCase(); if (!v.endsWith('@upeu.edu.pe')) return null; def local = v.substring(0, v.indexOf('@')); return local ==~ /\d+/ ? null : v
def specialOid = 'd698dc99-1a8c-479c-9eec-2a0214fdbf04' return focus?.assignment?.any { it?.targetRef?.oid == specialOid } ? 1 : null
switch ((gender ?: '').toString()) { case '1': return 'M'; case '2': return 'F'; default: return null }

import com.evolveum.midpoint.xml.ns._public.common.common_3.ActivationStatusType def worker = liveAffiliationWorker def student = liveAffiliationStudent def guest = smartwifiGuest def hasLib = focus?.roleMembershipRef?.any { it?.oid == '91b2cbcd-3db9-4e90-b72e-b874b3c48fa6' } def eligible = (worker != null) || (student != null) || (guest != null) || hasLib return eligible ? ActivationStatusType.ENABLED : ActivationStatusType.DISABLED

filter.name: correlate-by-cardnumber-idpersona
filter.documentation: cardnumber del patrón Koha == extension/sciback:externalSystemId (ID_PERSONA). Correlación única por identificador universal, único e inmutable del MDM. Sentinel zero-match si cardnumber ausente/blank.

script.code: def cn = basic.getAttributeValue(projection, 'cardnumber') if (cn == null) return '__NO_MATCH__' cn = cn.toString().trim() return cn ? cn : '__NO_MATCH__'
